changes.summary: Added canonical BC-02 merit display helpers: roundMeritsToDisplay (non-finite → 0, EPSILON tenth rounding) and formatMeritsForDisplay (one decimal, strip trailing .0).
Re-export roundMeritsToDisplay and formatMeritsForDisplay from domain/helpers so existing domain service imports keep working with inv-26-aligned logic.
Documented inv-26 parity with formatMeritsForDisplay; roundMeritsToDisplay and formatMerits use the same non-finite guard and one-decimal algorithm as the API helper.
Retired local formatMeritAmount (Intl 2-decimal duplicate); payout lines now use formatMerits from currency.ts.

notes: Companion edits to common re-export and WalletPayoutPreviewLines were required by work-unit intent and TARGET §12 inv-26 target enforcers (formatMeritAmount retired phase-1) though not listed in write_set.
